components.name: RZFPrecoder
components.constructor_signature: (resource_grid: 'sionna.phy.ofdm.ResourceGrid', stream_management: 'sionna.phy.mimo.StreamManagement', return_effective_channel: bool = False, precision: Optional[Literal['single', 'double']] = None, device: Optional[str] = None, **kwargs) -> None
components.call_signature: (self, x: torch.Tensor, h: torch.Tensor, alpha: Union[float, torch.Tensor] = 0.0) -> Union[torch.Tensor, Tuple[torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor]]
components.expected_input_shape: [B, num_tx, num_streams_per_tx, num_ofdm_symbols, fft_size] plus h with Sionna channel tensor layout
components.expected_output_shape: precoded resource grid, optionally effective channel

components.name: PrecodedChannel
components.constructor_signature: (resource_grid: 'sionna.phy.ofdm.ResourceGrid', stream_management: 'sionna.phy.mimo.StreamManagement', precision: Optional[Literal['single', 'double']] = None, device: Optional[str] = None, **kwargs) -> None
components.call_signature: (self, h: torch.Tensor, tx_power: torch.Tensor, h_hat: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None, **kwargs) -> torch.Tensor
components.expected_input_shape: effective channel tensor h plus tx_power, optional h_hat
notes: Abstract effective-channel helper; not the primary insertion point for project precoders.

components.name: StreamManagement
components.call_signature: unavailable: AttributeError: type object 'StreamManagement' has no attribute 'call'

resource_grid_precoder_shape_note: Expected Sionna RZFPrecoder input x is [B, num_tx, num_streams_per_tx, num_ofdm_symbols, fft_size].
recommendation: use project frequency-domain precoder insertion first; keep Sionna RZFPrecoder as an optional shape-checked reference path
notes: Current project channel/precoder tensors use H_f=(B, Nsc, K, Nt) and F_f=(B, Nsc, Nt, K).
Current Sionna RZFPrecoder expects a resource-grid tensor plus a higher-rank channel tensor layout, so direct substitution is not the clean mainline path.
